mapper.select: SELECT * FROM psychological_assessments WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY assessment_date DESC
SELECT * FROM psychological_assessments WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND assess_type = #{assessType} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY assessment_date DESC
SELECT * FROM psychological_assessments WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY assessment_date DESC LIMIT 1
